title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Liberty Shoes

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Liberty Shoes
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Liberty Shoes! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Amritsar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Liberty Shoes:
Liberty Shoes is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Planogram

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Liberty Shoes!
